Our Services

Comprehensive Medical Services

From routine check-ups to specialized treatment, we provide complete healthcare solutions under one roof.

🏥

General Medicine

Expert diagnosis and treatment for common and complex medical conditions with personalised care plans.

👶

Paediatrics

Dedicated children's healthcare from newborn care to adolescent medicine with gentle, expert care.

🤰

Maternity & ANC

Comprehensive antenatal care, safe delivery services, and postnatal support for mothers and babies.

🔬

Laboratory

State-of-the-art diagnostic laboratory offering accurate, fast results for all tests and investigations.

💊

Pharmacy

Fully stocked in-house pharmacy providing prescribed medications and over-the-counter drugs.

🚑

Emergency Care

24-hour emergency services with trained staff and equipment ready to handle any medical crisis.

Why Choose Us

A Hospital That Truly Cares

At Loving Heart Hospital, we combine modern medicine with genuine compassion. Every patient is treated like family.

🏆

Experienced Medical Team

Our qualified doctors, nurses, and specialists bring years of experience and dedication to every patient.

⚡

Fast & Accurate Diagnosis

Modern laboratory equipment ensures you get accurate results quickly so treatment begins without delay.

💚

Affordable Quality Care

We believe quality healthcare should be accessible. Our pricing is fair and transparent with no hidden charges.

📍

Convenient Location

Located in Cashier, Agbara Road, Ogun State — easily accessible from Agbara, Sango, and surrounding areas.

Book an Appointment Today

About Us

About Loving Heart Hospital

Loving Heart Hospital is a leading healthcare institution located in Cashier, Agbara Road, Ogun State, Nigeria. We are committed to providing compassionate, affordable, and quality medical care to our patients and the surrounding communities.

Our hospital is equipped with modern diagnostic equipment and staffed by highly trained medical professionals. We offer general medicine, paediatrics, maternity care, laboratory services, and 24-hour emergency care.

500+
Patients Treated
10+
Expert Doctors
24/7
Emergency Ready
100%
Patient Focus
Medical Services

Everything You Need Under One Roof

Our hospital offers comprehensive healthcare services for patients of all ages.

🏥

General Medicine & OPD

Expert consultation and treatment for adult medical conditions. Thorough examination and personalised treatment plans.

👶

Paediatrics (Children Care)

Specialist care for infants, children, and adolescents. Routine check-ups, vaccinations, and childhood illnesses.

🤰

Maternity & ANC

Complete antenatal care, safe deliveries, and postnatal support. We guide mothers through every stage of pregnancy.

🔬

Laboratory Diagnostics

Advanced diagnostic testing including blood tests, malaria RDT, urinalysis, HbA1c, FBC, and more. Fast, accurate results.

💊

In-House Pharmacy

Fully stocked pharmacy with prescribed and OTC medications. Our pharmacists ensure safe and correct dispensing.

🚑

24/7 Emergency Care

Round-the-clock emergency services. Our trained team responds swiftly to accidents, sudden illnesses, and critical cases.

💉

Vaccinations & Immunisation

All routine and travel vaccinations for children and adults including yellow fever, hepatitis, tetanus, and more.

🩺

Specialist Consultations

Access to specialist doctors in various fields. Referrals made simple within our hospital network.

🩸

Blood & IV Therapy

Safe administration of intravenous fluids, blood products, and IV medications under strict medical supervision.

Our Team

Meet Our Expert Doctors

Our dedicated team of medical professionals brings expertise, compassion, and commitment to every patient.
